title: Outreach workflow form at /draft
userStory: As Steve, I want a focused draft flow so that the smoke-test workflow for Phase 2 has a dedicated screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Input accepts company URL OR LinkedIn URL OR plain company name
Submit kicks off a chat-style flow with draft_outreach as the first tool call
Inline-editable draft shown in a textarea
Save draft button calls save_draft tool
Mark as sent button promotes the draft to a Graphiti Outreach episode
Verify: end-to-end on phone over train wifi: input -> draft -> edit -> save -> send -> episode visible via search_brain
